history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a lava cell, so moving forward would be deadly. The safe open cell is to my right, so I will turn clockwise to face it and avoid the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The left side path appears to be the only safe open route, so I should rotate counter-clockwise to face it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I cannot go forward safely. A safe move is to rotate clockwise to look for an alternate path along the open floor.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Estou em um corredor estreito. A célula à frente é uma parede, então não posso seguir em frente. A célula à minha esquerda é livre, enquanto à direita também há uma parede. Vou girar no sentido anti-horário para passar a encarar o corredor livre.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly in front is a lava cell, so moving forward would be fatal. The safest immediate move is to turn clockwise to look for a safe path around the lava barrier.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Estou olhando para cima, pois o símbolo ^ está na linha inferior. A célula imediatamente à frente é L (lava), então não posso seguir em frente com segurança. Preciso desviar; a única direção aparentemente livre ao meu redor é virar para evitar a lava à frente.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. The left side has open floor cells, so I should rotate counter-clockwise to explore toward the accessible path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
À minha frente há uma parede, então não posso seguir em frente. A célula livre mais promissora está à esquerda; preciso virar para alinhar-me com ela e continuar pelo corredor seguro.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a lava cell, so moving forward would be unsafe. The cell to my right is free, so I will turn clockwise to face it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The safe open cell is to my left, so I should turn counter-clockwise to face it and avoid the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a lava cell, so I cannot go forward safely. I need to rotate to find a safe path around the lava barrier. Turning clockwise will let me inspect/move toward the open floor cells on the right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I cannot go forward safely. The only safe nearby open cell is to my left, so I should rotate counter-clockwise to face it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I should rotate clockwise to look for a safe path around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Estou em uma coluna estreita com lava à esquerda e uma parede à direita. A célula imediatamente à frente parece livre (`.`), então posso avançar com segurança para continuar pelo corredor em direção à área desconhecida e possivelmente ao objetivo.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The left side also appears blocked or unsafe, while the only open direction from my current position is to turn and follow the corridor upward/rightward. I will rotate clockwise to face a possible safe path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a free floor cell, while the cells to the left are also open and there is a wall to the right. Since moving forward is safe and explores toward the unknown area ahead, I will go forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is `.` and safe, while the right side is blocked by `#`. I should move forward to explore the open path.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell, while there is a wall to my right. Moving forward is the safest way to continue exploring toward the unknown and possible goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me appears to be an open floor cell, while the path to the right is blocked by a wall. Since moving forward is safe and keeps me exploring the open corridor, I will go straight.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
A célula imediatamente à frente de mim é livre (`.`), então posso avançar com segurança. Vou seguir em frente.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, while the left side is blocked by walls and the goal is not yet visible. Moving forward is the best safe exploration step.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
There is no goal visible yet, but the cell directly in front of me appears to be a free floor cell, while there is a wall to the right boundary. Moving forward is safe and will help explore the map.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is empty, so moving forward is safe. I will advance toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a free floor cell, so moving forward is safe. I should advance rather than turning.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
A célula imediatamente à frente de mim parece ser `.` (segura), enquanto a direita é uma parede `#`. Como não há motivo para girar agora, vou avançar para explorar o corredor livre.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
